name: Dr. Sarah Johnson
title: President & Founder
bio: Dr. Johnson is an aerospace engineer with over 15 years of experience in rocket propulsion systems. She founded Saguaro Strikers to inspire the next generation of aerospace professionals.

name: James Mitchell
title: Vice President
bio: James is a mechanical engineer and rocketry enthusiast with expertise in structural design and materials science. He has mentored numerous student teams to competition success.

name: Dr. Maria Garcia
title: Technical Advisor
bio: Dr. Garcia specializes in avionics and flight computer systems. With a PhD in Electrical Engineering, she brings cutting-edge knowledge in embedded systems to our teams.

name: Robert Chen
title: Safety Officer
bio: Robert is a certified Level 3 rocketry expert and safety specialist. He ensures all activities comply with safety regulations and best practices in high-power rocketry.
